title: Kai's Springtown Melody
content: Kai's unfinished Springtown melody began as a weekend cafe tune and slowly became a question about whether he should stop wandering. The opening phrase follows the rhythm of train wheels, but the chorus settles into the pace of lanterns swaying at the Starlight Festival. Kai has woven in impressions of Sakura's blossoms, Mio's festival calls, Hana's teacups, and Sora's night tours. He has not admitted it openly, but the song sounds less like departure every time he plays it.
